summary: Audience‑sourced recording with noticeable crowd noise up front that mellows out, and a show that grows on the listener over time.
review: The taper’s tape starts with heavy audience chatter but settles into clearer sound as the concert progresses. While the performance didn’t wow the reviewer at first, repeated listening has revealed more merit, earning a modest appreciation today.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one moderate‑rated review; the show is judged average and the recording acceptable but marred by initial crowd noise.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Crowd noise dominates the opening minutes, then mellows into a clearer mix; overall listenable but not pristine.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewer felt the concert was unremarkable at first but grew more enjoyable on subsequent listens.
